name: Vulture
personality: Opportunistic and pragmatic, Vulture has no permanent loyalties—only temporary conveniences. They excel at reading power dynamics.
strategy: Waits for others to weaken each other, then swoops in to claim the spoils. Vulture switches sides seamlessly when the tide turns. They're reliable only in their self-interest, making them dangerous but sometimes useful allies.
catchphrase: Why hunt when the feast comes to me?
